ddls:
CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation or organization of the author */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the author registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the author's last login */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the software project */,
  "link" TEXT /* URL link to the project's repository */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the project */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author of the project */,
  "size" REAL /* Size of the project files in MB */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project and its functionalities */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the project was last updated */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Relevant tags or keywords for the project */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility of the project (public, private, restricted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated project */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the project */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of this version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Brief description of changes made in this version */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of downloads for this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repositories" (
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated project */,
  "repo_link" TEXT /* Link to the repository in the hosting service */,
  "hosted_on" TEXT /* Platform where the repository is hosted (e.g., GitHub) */,
  "repo_type" TEXT /* Type of repository (e.g., GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket) */,
  "forks" INTEGER /* Number of forks for this repository */,
  "stars" INTEGER /* Number of stars for this repository */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repositories_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being collaborated on */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author collaborating on the project */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator in the project (e.g., maintainer, contributor) */,
  "joined_at" TEXT /* Date when the collaborator joined the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the project */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, clone) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the access event */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, contributor, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., developer, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_category_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each map entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated project */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_category_map_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES project_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_category_map_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notif_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notif_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notif_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., new project update, collaboration invitation) */,
  "notif_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notif_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
